title: I Borgia
actors: Enrico Piacentini, Eugenio Gilardoni, Irene-Saffo Momo
plot: The tale opens with the election of Rodriga Borgia to the office of Pope Alexander VI. Then it switches to a succession of attempts by Caesar Borgia to kill or have killed Alfonzo of Aragon, husband of Lucretia. The assassinations...
